message:
fix: suppress dead-code warnings for uring ops and TLS cert helpers

These items are scaffolded for future use but not yet called from the
public API:
- OP_CLOSE constant and OpState::Pending variant in fs/uring.rs
- load_env_certs and load_pem_file methods in tls/connector.rs

Without the #[allow(dead_code)] annotations, downstream projects that
clone asupersync with -D warnings (e.g. mcp_agent_mail_rust CI) fail
to compile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
